channel.title: Comments on: Flying Dog Brewery: Raging Bitch, Ep. 159
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Bruce F
item.dc:creator: Bruce F
item.description: If you think it's good from the bottle, you should get it on tap! Fantastic!!!
item.content:encoded: If you think it’s good from the bottle, you should get it on tap! Fantastic!!!

item.title: By: Matt H
item.dc:creator: Matt H
item.description:
I have a friend that loves this beer. (I like it to) If you like Raging Bitch, you will also like Full Nelson by Blue Mountain Brewery in Nelson County Virginia. A very good IPA. They grow their own hops and have a small pub at the brewery.
Cheers,
Matt H
item.content:encoded:
I have a friend that loves this beer. (I like it to)
If you like Raging Bitch, you will also like Full Nelson by Blue Mountain Brewery in Nelson County Virginia. A very good IPA. They grow their own hops and have a small pub at the brewery.

Cheers,

Matt H

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Green burps! I'm stealing that heheh Raging Bitch is a great name for a brew... I'm stealing that too!
Keep them reviews coming!
Cheers guys Marco
item.content:encoded:
Green burps! I’m stealing that heheh
Raging Bitch is a great name for a brew… I’m stealing that too!

Keep them reviews coming!

Cheers guys
Marco

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: It's pretty damn good! My favorite in that style is Monks Revenge from Terrapin. Their in Athens Georgia and small, but if you ever see it...get it!!
item.content:encoded: It’s pretty damn good! My favorite in that style is Monks Revenge from Terrapin. Their in Athens Georgia and small, but if you ever see it…get it!!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description: Bitch is on my A list of all-time favorites. Unfortunately, Arizona made the cut list of states when Flying Dog decided to pull back distribution last year. That's too bad, considering their Colorado roots.
item.content:encoded: Bitch is on my A list of all-time favorites. Unfortunately, Arizona made the cut list of states when Flying Dog decided to pull back distribution last year. That’s too bad, considering their Colorado roots.
